word: G131 - αἱμοῤῥέω - haimorrhéō - hahee-mor-hreh'-o - Diseased with an issue of blood

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Diseased with an issue of blood
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to suffer from a flow of blood
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G129 and G4482; to flow blood, that is, have a haemorrhage: - diseased with an issue of blood.
